info.name: Google Workspace Admin SDK Directory API

params.name: domain
params.description: The domain name. Use this field to get groups from only one domain. To return all domains for a customer account, use the customer query parameter instead.

params.name: customer
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. In a multi-domain account, use this to list all groups for a customer. You can also use the my_customer alias.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-500). Default is 100.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token to specify the next page in the list.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Property to use for sorting results.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Whether to return results in ascending or descending order.

params.name: query
params.description: Query string for searching user fields. For more information on constructing user queries, see the Search for Users documentation.

params.name: showDeleted
params.description: If set to true, retrieves the list of deleted users.

params.name: projection
params.description: What subset of fields to fetch for this user.

params.name: viewType
params.description: Whether to fetch the administrator-only or domain-wide public view of the user. Default is admin_view.

params.name: customFieldMask
params.description: A comma-separated list of schema names. All fields from these schemas are fetched. Must be set when projection=custom.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of either deleted users or all users in a domain. Requires authorization with the admin.directory.user.readonly or admin.directory.user scope.
Creates a user account. The new user account is created in the customer account specified in the request body.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

params.name: projection
params.description: What subset of fields to fetch for this user.

params.name: viewType
params.description: Whether to fetch the administrator-only or domain-wide public view of the user.

params.name: customFieldMask
params.description: A comma-separated list of schema names. All fields from these schemas are fetched. Must be set when projection=custom.

items.docs: Retrieves a user account by user key (primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID).

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Updates a user account. This replaces the entire user resource. Use patch for partial updates.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Updates a user account using patch semantics. Only the fields specified in the request body are updated.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Deletes a user account. Deleted users are recoverable for a period of 20 days using the undelete method.

info.name: Make a User a Super Administrator

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Makes a user a super administrator. This can only be done by another super administrator.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Restores a recently deleted user account. Users are recoverable for a period of 20 days after deletion.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Identifies the user in the API request. The value can be the user primary email address, alias email address, or unique user ID.

items.docs: Signs a user out of all web and device sessions and resets their sign-in cookies.

params.name: domain
params.description: The domain name. Use this field to get groups from only one domain. To return all domains for a customer account, use the customer query parameter instead.

params.name: customer
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. In a multi-domain account, use this to list all groups for a customer. You can also use the my_customer alias.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-200). Default is 200.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token to specify the next page in the list.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Column to use for sorting results.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Whether to return results in ascending or descending order.

params.name: userKey
params.description: Email or immutable ID of the user to list groups for. If specified, returns only those groups the user is a member of.

params.name: query
params.description: Query string for searching group fields. See the Searching for Groups documentation for supported fields.

items.docs: Retrieves all groups of a domain or all groups a user is a member of. Requires authorization with the admin.directory.group.readonly or admin.directory.group scope.
Creates a group in the specified domain.

params.name: groupKey
params.description: Identifies the group in the API request. The value can be the group email address, group alias, or the unique group ID.

items.docs: Retrieves a group's properties by group key (group email address, group alias, or the unique group ID).

params.name: groupKey
params.description: Identifies the group in the API request. The value can be the group email address, group alias, or the unique group ID.

items.docs: Updates a group's properties. This replaces the entire group resource.

params.name: groupKey
params.description: Identifies the group in the API request. The value can be the group email address, group alias, or the unique group ID.

items.docs: Updates a group's properties using patch semantics. Only the specified fields are updated.

params.name: groupKey
params.description: Identifies the group in the API request. The value can be the group email address, group alias, or the unique group ID.

items.docs: Deletes a group.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

params.name: type
params.description: Whether to return all sub-organizations or just immediate children.

params.name: orgUnitPath
params.description: The full path to the organizational unit or its unique ID. Returns child organizational units beneath the specified path.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all organizational units for an account. The hierarchy of organizational units is limited to 35 levels of depth.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

items.docs: Adds an organizational unit under the specified customer account.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

params.name: orgUnitPath
params.description: The full path of the organizational unit (minus the leading /) or its unique ID.

items.docs: Retrieves an organizational unit.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

params.name: orgUnitPath
params.description: The full path of the organizational unit (minus the leading /) or its unique ID.

items.docs: Updates an organizational unit. This replaces the entire resource. Use patch for partial updates.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

params.name: orgUnitPath
params.description: The full path of the organizational unit (minus the leading /) or its unique ID.

items.docs: Updates an organizational unit using patch semantics. Only the specified fields are updated.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID for the customer Google Workspace account. Use the value my_customer to represent the account associated with the authenticated administrator.

params.name: orgUnitPath
params.description: The full path of the organizational unit (minus the leading /) or its unique ID.

items.docs: Removes an organizational unit. Only empty organizational units can be deleted. All users and child organizational units must be moved or deleted before the parent can be removed.
